signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), below market forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence** [1]

This March figure, reported as the latest data, marks an uptick but undershot expectations amid global energy volatility from the Iran/Middle East conflict, with no newer April confirmation or resolution noted [1][4][5]. Bank of Korea held rates at 2.5% on April
